Q13 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A communication channel with AWGN has a bandwidth of 4 kHz and an SNR of 31. Due to noise, the bandwidth efficiency reduces to half. For error free transmission, the ratio of energy per bit transmitted to noise power spectral density should be atleast equal to __________. (rounded upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 1.86
Solution

1.86 (1.70 - 1.99)

NAT
Correct answer: 0.485
Solution

0.485 (0.400 - 0.550)

Correct answer: 95
Solution

95 (94.5 - 95.5)

Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0

A signal m1(t) is bandlimited to 5 kHz and three other signals m2(t), m3(t) and m4(t) are bandlimited to 2 kHz each. These signals are to be transmitted by means of time-division multiplexing. If the commutator output is quantized using 512-level quantizer and the result is binary-coded, the minimum output bit rate for faithful transmission is _________ kbps.

NAT
Correct answer: 198
Solution

198 (198 - 198)

Q30 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A carrier system used in digital telephony system time multiplexes 20 voice channels. Each voice channel is sampled at 10 kHz and a ‘n’ level quantizer is used. If 20 additional bits are added at the end of the frame for the purpose of synchronization, then the resultant transmission rate is
1.8 Mbps. Number of Quantization levels ‘n’ is _________.

NAT
Correct answer: 256
Solution

256 (256 - 256)

 
Q31 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

Let X(t) and Y(t) be defined by
X(t) = A cos ωt + B sin ωt
Y(t) = B cos ωt – A sin ωt
where ω = 1 rad/sec and A and B are independent random variables having zero mean and
variance of 5. The cross-correlation of X(t) and Y(t) for a lag of τ = 5 sec is ________. (Rounded upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 4.79
Solution

4.79 (4.20 - 5.50)
